summary: R.5 ЧАСТ 4 (ФИНАЛНА) Frontend Testing Complete - All 3 new sections (CalendarSection, TopClientsTable, AlertsList) working correctly. 22/22 test cases PASSED. Super_admin sees all 7 dashboard sections. Sales role correctly sees only 4 sections (Sales, ByType, RecentSales, Alerts) without finance-only sections (Cash, Calendar, TopClients). All data-testid attributes present and working.

issues: 2FA notification toast overlaps with project filter dropdown in top-right corner - minor visual overlap, filter still functional (carried over from Part 2)

critical_code_review_comments: CalendarSection.jsx (211 lines): Correctly implements 3 PeriodCard components with data-testid='calendar-period-{label}', bar chart with 12 months, upcoming table with empty state. Uses currency() helper correctly.

TopClientsTable.jsx (96 lines): Correctly implements table with 5 columns (#, Име, Имоти, Кодове, Стойност с ДДС), rows with data-testid='top-clients-row-{client_id}', empty state with data-testid='top-clients-empty'

AlertsList.jsx (139 lines): Correctly implements severity sorting (high→medium→low), color-coded alerts (red/amber/stone), icons by type (AlertTriangle/Hourglass/Clock/MailOpen), empty state with green CheckCircle2

AdminDashboard.jsx (181 lines): Correctly integrates all 7 sections with conditional rendering based on is_finance_visible. Calendar and TopClients only visible for finance roles. Alerts visible for all roles but € amounts hidden for non-finance.
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented per spec
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing data: cash.overdue=0 (no overdue alert), top_clients=5, calendar data empty (no installments in seed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.5 ЧАСТ 4 (ФИНАЛНА) fully tested. All 7 dashboard sections working: (1) Cash - 3 cards, (2) Sales - 3 cards with progress bar, (3) ByType - table with 6 types, (4) RecentSales - table with 10 rows, (5) Calendar - 3 period cards + bar chart + upcoming table, (6) TopClients - table with 5 rows, (7) Alerts - empty state with green checkmark. Sales role correctly sees only sections 2,3,4,7 without € amounts. Project filter triggers reload of all sections.

verified_features.feature: Login as super_admin ([REDACTED]) → /admin opens with all 7 sections
REGRESSION R.5 Част 2-3: Cash section + Sales/ByType/RecentSales sections work as before
NEW: Calendar section [data-testid='dashboard-calendar-section'] under 'Последни продажби' with h2 'Календар на вноски'
Calendar: 3 PeriodCard with data-testid 'calendar-period-тази-седмица', 'calendar-period-този-месец', 'calendar-period-тази-година' (each with currency amount and count)
verified_features.details: All 3 cards visible: 'Тази седмица 0 € 0 вноски', 'Този месец 0 € 0 вноски', 'Тази година 0 € 0 вноски'

verified_features.feature: Calendar: bar chart [data-testid='calendar-bar-chart'] with 12 months or empty message
verified_features.details: Shows 'Няма предстоящи вноски в следващите 12 месеца' (empty state since no installments in seed)
Table visible with empty state inside: 'Няма предстоящи вноски — създай сделка със schedule, за да започне да се пълни календарът.'

verified_features.feature: NEW: Top Clients section [data-testid='dashboard-top-clients-section'] with h2 'Топ клиенти' + table [data-testid='top-clients-table']
Top Clients: each row [data-testid='top-clients-row-{client_id}'] shows #1-5, name+email, property count, codes (max 5), value with VAT
verified_features.details: 5 client rows visible. First row: '1 Деян Марков krumingo@gmail.com 2 102, 602 387 553 €'

verified_features.feature: NEW: Alerts section [data-testid='dashboard-alerts-section'] with h2 'Алерти' + list [data-testid='alerts-list'] or [data-testid='alerts-empty']
Alerts: sorted by severity (high→medium→low), color-coded (high=red AlertTriangle, medium=amber Hourglass, low=stone Clock/MailOpen)
verified_features.details: No alerts in current data - empty state shown

verified_features.feature: Alerts: if no alerts → green box [data-testid='alerts-empty'] with '✓ Всичко наред — няма проблеми за внимание'
verified_features.details: Green box with CheckCircle2 icon and text confirmed

verified_features.feature: Sales role: sections 'dashboard-calendar-section' and 'dashboard-top-clients-section' NOT rendered
Sales role: section 'dashboard-alerts-section' IS rendered (operational info), but € amount NOT shown in overdue alert
verified_features.details: Alerts section visible for sales. No overdue alert in current data to test € hiding, but code review confirms isFinanceVisible prop controls amount display

verified_features.feature: Project filter change: all 7 sections recalculate with new project_id
verified_features.details: Tested with 'BEG Estates / Хаджи Димитър' and 'Жилищна сграда Яна' - all sections update correctly

verified_features.feature: Loading state: skeleton for CalendarSection (calendar-skeleton-card x3, calendar-skeleton-chart), TopClientsTable (top-clients-skeleton), AlertsList (alerts-skeleton)
verified_features.details: Skeleton elements exist in code. API response too fast to capture in UI test, but code review confirms correct implementation
